title: Theosis
description: Plugin-ready RPG survival with loot, gems, bosses & biomes. Thesis-style modularity. Multilanguage Apotheosis-inspired
body:
![Logo](https://res.cloudinary.com/dhgdy73up/image/upload/v1761583514/Create_a_logo_that_s_ulnsev.png)

# **Theosis — Apotheosis-inspired RPG progression for servers (loot, gems, towers, bosses & variants)**

**Theosis** is a full plugin reinterpretation of the **Apotheosis** mod — built for **servers**.  
If you love *Apotheosis* but need a **vanilla-friendly**, **no-mods** experience for your community, **Theosis is the best option**.

It brings the same addictive loop: **better loot → stronger builds → harder encounters → bigger rewards**, with everything **fully configurable** and performance-focused.

---

## ⭐ Why you’ll love Theosis (if you’re an Apotheosis fan)

- **Real rarity-based loot** (balanced progression, not sponge enemies)
- **Sockets + Gems** to create actual builds
- **Towers in all 3 dimensions** (Overworld / Nether / End)
- **Bosses with scaling and unique abilities**
- **Mob variants** that make the world unpredictable
- **Multi-language** + **100% configurable** (names, tiers, weights, limits… everything)

> Works on **Spigot** and **Paper**.  
> **Paper is recommended** for the best experience and to avoid edge-case perk behavior.

---

## 🏰 Towers in all dimensions
Exploration finally matters again.

- Towers generate in **Overworld, Nether, and End**
- Each tower has **variable loot**
- Loot can include **socketed gear** and **gems**
- Configurable spawn rules, biomes, chance, and performance limits

---

## 🎁 Reinvented loot progression
Chests and rewards scale with real rarity rules:

- Rarities control **how many perks**, **how many sockets**, and **how often** items appear
- Fully configurable weights and caps
- Designed to feel exciting **without breaking survival balance**

---

## 💎 Sockets + Gems = real builds
Gear can roll with sockets, and gems let players specialize:

- Damage / tank / mobility / utility styles
- Caps for PvE/PvP balance (configurable)
- Yunque system (costs / break chance / limits configurable)

---

## ✨ Gem System: Stonecutter
You can now use the Stonecutter to manage the gems socketed into your gear.

How it works:
Place an item with socketed gems into the Stonecutter.
The result will display the same item with one less gem.
When you take the result:
🗑️ The gem is destroyed.
🔓 The socket is freed and ready for a new gem.
[!IMPORTANT]

Gems are removed from top to bottom.
You cannot choose a specific gem; they must be removed one by one. 

Stonecutters item Socket busy socket free
![Stonecutter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/642c2d3c8eeb0ed7fe6c1c5b2b8af2c95a64046c.png)
![Remove gem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77474fa9768665d2f444ddf9ec00e8ad1398c257.png)


## 👹 Mob variants & elites
Normal mobs can spawn as **enhanced variants** with special behaviors and better drops.

- More variety, more danger, more fun
- Rarity scaling for enemies too
- Configurable spawn reasons and limits

---

## 👑 Bosses with progression
Bosses are not “just more HP”.

- Abilities + effects + bossbar
- Scales with server progression
- Can be configured per dimension and rarity rules
- Rewards match the difficulty

---

## 💎 Arcane Library
Inspired by high-magic systems (like Apotheosis), this structure allows you to centralize and amplify your enchanting power.

Core Features:
Storage: Store enchanted books directly.
Accumulation: Convert books into "Power Points" for each specific enchantment type.
Recombination: Extract books at higher levels based on your stored power.
🧪 Crafting & Structure
To obtain the Arcane Library Barrel, use the following recipe:

Materials: 5 Eyes of Ender, 1 Barrel, 1 Nether Star.
Crafting Pattern:

[ Eye of Ender ] [ Eye of Ender ] [ Eye of Ender ]
[ Eye of Ender ] [    Barrel    ] [ Eye of Ender ]
[      -       ] [ Nether Star  ] [      -       ]
Arcane Library
![Arcane Library](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6056ea282f68a8d2a94090c44a5871de0b26a12.png)

Activation Structure: The barrel will not function alone. It must be surrounded by bookshelves:

[ S ] [ S ] [ S ]
[ S ] [ B ] [ S ]
(S = Chiseled Bookshelf / Bookshelf | B = Arcane Barrel)
![Bookstore layout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f6e84d12530cc8d151a9bf259d956e9c863d504.png)

---

## 🌍 Fully configurable & multi-language
Theosis is built for admins:

- Enable/disable modules (perks / gems / structures / bosses / tiers / variants)
- Change names of items, perks, bosses, and more
- Tune progression, chances, caps, tier difficulty, and loot rules
- Includes **es_mx** and **en_us** language files

---

## ✅ Compatibility
- **Minecraft 1.21+**
- **Spigot + Paper**
- **Paper recommended** (better performance & fewer edge cases)

---

## 📌 Useful commands
> Command names may vary by config/version.

```txt
/theosis hub
/theosis reload
/theosis boss spawn [player]
/theosis boss clear [all]
